mapper.select: SELECT id, title, name, phone, birthday, order_history, monthly_visits, amount, companion_count, companion_memo, visit_date, notes, sales_trend_data, visit_count_trend_data, visit_date_trend_data, bottle_trend_data, completed FROM todos ORDER BY id

SELECT id, title, name, phone, birthday, order_history, monthly_visits, amount, companion_count, companion_memo, visit_date, notes, sales_trend_data, visit_count_trend_data, visit_date_trend_data, bottle_trend_data, completed FROM todos WHERE id = #{id}

choose.when: INSERT INTO todos (id, title, name, phone, birthday, order_history, monthly_visits, amount, companion_count, companion_memo, visit_date, notes, sales_trend_data, visit_count_trend_data, visit_date_trend_data, bottle_trend_data, completed) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birthday}, #{orderHistory}, #{monthlyVisits}, #{amount}, #{companionCount}, #{companionMemo}, #{visitDate}, #{notes}, #{salesTrendData}, #{visitCountTrendData}, #{visitDateTrendData}, #{bottleTrendData}, #{completed})
choose.otherwise: INSERT INTO todos (title, name, phone, birthday, order_history, monthly_visits, amount, companion_count, companion_memo, visit_date, notes, sales_trend_data, visit_count_trend_data, visit_date_trend_data, bottle_trend_data, completed) VALUES (#{title}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birthday}, #{orderHistory}, #{monthlyVisits}, #{amount}, #{companionCount}, #{companionMemo}, #{visitDate}, #{notes}, #{salesTrendData}, #{visitCountTrendData}, #{visitDateTrendData}, #{bottleTrendData}, #{completed})

mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, birthday = #{birthday}, order_history = #{orderHistory}, monthly_visits = #{monthlyVisits}, amount = #{amount}, companion_count = #{companionCount}, companion_memo = #{companionMemo}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, notes = #{notes}, sales_trend_data = #{salesTrendData}, visit_count_trend_data = #{visitCountTrendData}, visit_date_trend_data = #{visitDateTrendData}, bottle_trend_data = #{bottleTrendData}, completed = #{completed} WHERE id = #{id}
